property.name: showOpportunitiesForDescendentAccounts
property.label: Show data for child accounts
property.description: Controls whether Opportunities related to any child accounts are displayed initially.

property.name: columns
property.label: Columns
property.description: Comma separated list of Field API names for each table column. Supports parent relationship fields (e.g. Account.Name).

property.name: sortableFields
property.label: Sortable Columns
property.description: Comma separated list of Field API names. Supports parent relationship fields (e.g. Account.Type).

property.name: sortedBy
property.label: Default Sort Field
property.description: Single Field API Name. Supports parent relationship fields (e.g. Account.Type).

property.name: expressions
property.label: SOQL Condition Expression
property.description: One or more field expressions to filter the Opportunities by. Use SOQL Condition Expression syntax. (e.g. StageName != 'Closed Won' AND Amount > 0)

property.name: filtersBasedOnData
property.label: Only Show Filter values that have matching data in the table
property.description: If there is no data matching the filter then the filter will not be available, for example if there are no Opportunities in the Qualification Stage then 'Qualification' will not show up in the Stage Name filters

property.name: useRelativeMaxHeight
property.label: Limit Height (Relative to screen)
property.description: Force table height to 60% of the vertical screen space. To set a custom percentage, use this in conjunction with Custom Relative Max Height

property.name: customRelativeMaxHeight
property.label: Custom Relative Max Height
property.description: Set custom max height (0-100) relative to the vertical screen space. Limit Height must first be enabled.
